title: Ars Expanded Combat Compat
description: adds Compatability between Expanded Combat and Ars Nouveau
body:
[![CurseForge Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3494a91b8d02c32063e94ab08f6dd796b5bb4634.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-expanded-combat) [![Cloth Config API Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7bff26028f093d51d9da01e07e384f91f63ae13.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) [![Curios dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aec5c41ae6f0aac946a80fe3cf688a7a336fa09_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) [![Expanded Combat Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59e9eeade55f309be535f0b860f0219c8863d4b0_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) [![Ars Nouveau Dependancy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/023b88f66904148b56a5eb8e815661329c78cce2_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau)
A plugin Mod for [Expanded Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-combat) adding compatibility with [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau). #### Adds support for: ars armors: sorcerer's, arcanist's, and Battle mage's gauntlets \ Enchanter's Weapons: they work the same way as the Enchanter's Sword \ \ \ Click the banner to get the discount: [![Bisect Hosting Promotional](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/91cdbb92-a3db-4f62-a182-239fe5589b2a.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/userofbricks)
